scope.included: DC transfer from the two D34 TTL output-pin voltages through R62/R63/R64, VT2, R65, and an optional external load
excluded: C94, whose population, value, and endpoints are unresolved
frequency-dependent transistor behavior and cable/probe capacitance
D34 edge shape, output impedance, and propagation delay
physical D34 logic polarity and video timing

d34_compatibility_reference.datasheet: ref/datasheets/sn74ls86a-ti.pdf, SDLS124 revision March 1988, document page 4

assumptions: D34 is the exact-revision К555ЛП5. TTL inputs are fixed pin voltages, not unloaded logic-source voltages; SN74LS86A values bound a comparison only and do not establish Soviet-part equivalence or a nonlinear D34 output model.
VT2 is a piecewise-linear NPN emitter follower: off below VBE, otherwise IE=(beta+1)*IB, with saturation checked but not needed by the declared corners.
The 75-ohm termination is in parallel with the fitted R65 emitter resistor.
The beta and VBE ranges are engineering sensitivity bounds, not measurements of the installed KT315Б.
